_comment: The 15 postable app features, derived from WEB_APP_FEATURE_HANDOFF.md. Each entry feeds the caption + image prompts. Keep facts accurate — captions must never claim a capability not listed here (prevents AI hallucination + false-claim ASO violations).

app.name: FieldCalc
app.tagline: GPS area measure & smart navigation in one app

features.name: GPS Area Measurement
features.short: Measure any land or field area by walking it or tapping points on the map.
features.description: Measure area using polygon points in GPS or manual mode. Supports Acre, Square Meter, Square Yard, Square Feet, Square Inch. Save, name, group, and share results.
features.primary_benefit: Know the exact size of any plot without hiring a surveyor.
use_cases: measure a farm field before planting
calculate plot size for a property listing

features.name: Distance Measurement
features.short: Measure distance along any path or line on the map or on foot.
features.description: Measure distance with line/path points. Units: Feet, Mile, Yard, Meter, Kilometer. GPS or manual mode, save and share.
features.primary_benefit: Measure exact distances without a measuring wheel or tape.

features.name: POI Markers
features.short: Drop and save points of interest anywhere on the map.
features.description: Mark single map points (POI), name them, assign to groups, and sync. Great for marking specific locations on a property.
features.primary_benefit: Never lose track of an important spot on your land or route.
use_cases: mark a well or gate on a farm
flag a problem area to revisit

features.name: Route Planner
features.short: Plan multi-stop routes with ordering, notes, and arrival windows.
features.description: Create named route plans with start/end, multiple stops, drag-and-drop ordering, notes, stay time, arrival windows, urgency and completion status.
features.primary_benefit: Organize a whole day of stops in the most efficient order.

features.name: Voice Navigation
features.short: Speak your destination and navigate hands-free.
features.description: Voice input to search and navigate to a destination. Keeps a voice search history with favorites.
features.primary_benefit: Find and go to any place just by speaking — eyes on the road.

features.name: Find Routes
features.short: Get directions with route alternatives, history, and favorites.
features.description: Source/destination search with autocomplete, route alternatives via Google Directions, saved route history and favorites.
features.primary_benefit: Pick the best of several routes and save the ones you reuse.

features.name: GPS Speedometer
features.short: Live GPS speed with analog, digital, HUD modes and trip history.
features.description: Live GPS speed in analog, digital, and map modes, HUD with themes, speed-limit warning, and full trip history (min/avg/max speed, distance, duration).
features.primary_benefit: Accurate speed and trip stats even where your dashboard can't help.

features.name: Digital Compass
features.short: Multi-mode compass: standard, camera, map, telescope, night.
features.description: Compass with standard, camera, map, telescope, satellite, and night modes for accurate direction in any condition.
features.primary_benefit: Find true direction anywhere, day or night.

features.name: GPS Stamp Camera
features.short: Photos auto-stamped with location, date, and time.
features.description: Capture photos stamped with location, address, date/time. Customizable stamp templates, colors, transparency, manual or automatic location.
features.primary_benefit: Proof-of-location photos for work, claims, and records.

features.name: GPS Photo Gallery
features.short: All your stamped photos organized by date and location.
features.description: Gallery of GPS photos grouped by date, with photo details, location on map, share and delete.
features.primary_benefit: Find any field photo by when and where you took it.

features.name: Wonder & Famous Places
features.short: Discover wonders, famous places, and travel stories.
features.description: Explore wonder places, famous places, and stories with detail screens, images, and map coordinates.
features.primary_benefit: Discover amazing places and plan your next trip.

features.name: Street View
features.short: Explore any location in immersive street-level view.
features.description: Street View entry and map selection with live preview; graceful fallback when unavailable.
features.primary_benefit: See a place at street level before you go.

features.name: Measurement Groups
features.short: Organize your measurements into colored, toggleable groups.
features.description: Create groups with name, color, and visibility. Assign measurements to groups, toggle them on the map, rename and delete.
features.primary_benefit: Keep dozens of fields and plots neatly organized.
use_cases: toggle a project's areas on the map

features.name: Saved Measurements
features.short: Every measurement saved, searchable, editable, and synced.
features.description: Saved list with detail view, edit, delete, search/filter, group filtering, thumbnails, and cross-device sync.
features.primary_benefit: Your measurement history, always with you and backed up.

features.name: Nearby & Location
features.short: Find nearby places and share your exact location instantly.
features.description: Current map location, nearby place shortcuts and categories, share/copy your location link, open searches in Google Maps.
features.primary_benefit: Find what's around you and let others find you fast.
